creator: bobf@mrp3.com
text:
It has been quite a while since I submitted this bug along with the proposed fix.

As a result, I'm just going to add a port for the gpioshutdown kernel module to resolve this.

I have already tested the 'work in progress' version on an RPi Model 2 running a slightly older (11.0) kernel, and plan on submitting a new port for the 'gpioshutdown' kernel module very soon.

The (tentative) port name is misc/raspberrypi-gpioshutdown and should only build for the armv6 architecture.  It's effectively the same as the patch files that are attached to the bug report.  I just need to make sure it passes all of the necessary lint and functionality tests in order to build/run correctly as a port before I submit it.
